task:
IT IS CRITICAL THAT YOU FOLLOW THIS COMMAND: LOAD the FULL {project-root}/_bmad/core/workflows/party-mode/workflow.md, READ its entire contents and follow its directions exactly!


ARGUMENTS: We're reviewing and fixing the SKF module. Key issue: bug-sidecar-path-missing-from-config.md — sidecar_path (prompt: false) is never written to installed config.yaml, causing silent workflow degradation across 8+ workflows. All silently fall back to Quick tier instead of detected tier. We need perspectives on: (1) Best fix approach — Option A (installer writes prompt:false vars) vs Option B (workflow fallback) vs hybrid, (2) Are there other missing impacts or regressions not listed in the todo?, (3) Is the silent failure pattern a broader design issue we should address?, (4) Any other bugs or issues in src/ we should catch while we're here?
